'''zakata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sabellid|sabellid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-k-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sabellid|sabellid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zakata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zækætæth|zækætæth]] || [[word:zækætæj|zækætæj]] || [[word:zækætæsh|zækætæsh]] || [[word:zækætæ|zækætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zakakatath|zakakatath]] || [[word:zakakataj|zakakataj]] || [[word:zakakatash|zakakatash]] || [[word:zakakata|zakakata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zakatath|zakatath]] || [[word:zakataj|zakataj]] || [[word:zakatash|zakatash]] || [[word:zakata|zakata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zakaftath|zakaftath]] || [[word:zakaftaj|zakaftaj]] || [[word:zakaftash|zakaftash]] || [[word:zakaftaf|zakaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zakatatha|zakatatha]] || [[word:zakataja|zakataja]] || [[word:zakatasha|zakatasha]] || [[word:zakataka|zakataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zakatath|zakatath]] || [[word:zakataj|zakataj]] || [[word:zakatash|zakatash]] || [[word:zakata|zakata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zakatathal|zakatathal]] || [[word:zakatajal|zakatajal]] || [[word:zakatashal|zakatashal]] || [[word:zakatakal|zakatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zakatathatha|zakatathatha]] || [[word:zakatajaja|zakatajaja]] || [[word:zakatashasha|zakatashasha]] || [[word:zakataka|zakataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zakatathan|zakatathan]] || [[word:zakatajan|zakatajan]] || [[word:zakatashan|zakatashan]] || [[word:zakatakan|zakatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zakatathaoro|zakatathaoro]] || [[word:zakatajaoro|zakatajaoro]] || [[word:zakatashaoro|zakatashaoro]] || [[word:zakatakaoro|zakatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
